englishDefinitions: To understand something completely and know what to do.
To have a clear plan or solution for everything.
persianTranslation: برای همه‌چیز نقشه داشتن / کاملاً سر درآوردن
examples: She acts like she’s got it all figured out.
I don’t have it all figured out yet.
By the end of the meeting, he had it all figured out.
